title: Forcing toddler to spend 6 hours in court every week so that grandfather can meet him is unjust: Gujarat High Court
description: Forcing a toddler to spend six hours on court premises every Thursday under the guise of access to grandparents is “uncalled for and unjust”, the Gujarat High Court recently observed.The Court made the observation while allowing a plea filed by the mother of a two-and-a-half-year-old child challenging a family court order. The order had required her to bring the child to court every Thursday from 11 am to 5 pm to facilitate visitation with the paternal grandfather in a child custody dispute.Just
